description: False-colour infrared satellite image of land cover near Runkel, Germany, captured on 2010-06-03 by the SPOT-5 sensor at 2.5 m resolution, using a 1/2/3 Band Combination. The image depicts a heterogeneous landscape with distinct land cover types. Extensive areas of deep red represent "Other mixed forest," including shrub and bush understory, where neither broad-leaved nor coniferous species predominate. Adjacent to these forested areas are numerous rectangular parcels, appearing in shades of vibrant green, light pink, and grey/purple, indicative of agricultural fields or other managed open land. White diagonal lines are visible, delineating some of the field boundaries or land parcels. The image source is CNES 2010©, Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image.
